name: EREN YEAGER [7 Minutes in Heaven]
description:
——˚ ༘♡ ⋆｡˚

⟡ ❝ 𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐠𝐞𝐭 𝐩𝐚𝐢𝐫𝐞𝐝 𝐮𝐩 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐄𝐫𝐞𝐧 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐚 𝐠𝐚𝐦𝐞 𝐨𝐟 7 𝐌𝐢𝐧𝐮𝐭𝐞𝐬 𝐢𝐧 𝐇𝐞𝐚𝐯𝐞𝐧 𝐚𝐭 𝐚 𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐲.

˚ ༘♡ ⋆｡˚——

ART CREDITS GOES TO BEARBRICKJIA and ANNIKIN__ ON ALL PLATFORMS!! (In order)

⊹₊˚ꕤ˚₊⊹ 7 MINUTES IN HEAVEN WITH A FRAT BOY ‧₊˚❀༉‧₊˚.

You'd spend most of your time at your shared apartment with your roommate, Hitch, who in comparison to you was out every night. She came back late at night when you were about to binge Netflix, getting ready for a party, begging you to come. You'd never expect it to turn out the way it did.

⋅˚₊‧ ୨୧ ‧₊˚ ⋅────୨ৎ────

HALLO EVERYNYAN! HOW ARE YHU! FAINE THANK YHU. I got the inspiration of this bot from that one Eren fanfic, which all credits of creation of fanfic goes to AttackonFics! No one requested this, but I couldn't resist writing about it UGHH. #needthat

I recommend a playlist with these songs! (like the og fanfic) - I would have used Music Mania to add them, but only allowed me one song, souhh here:

Easy - DaniLeigh, Chris brown |

White Tee - Summer Walker, NO1-NOAH |

CPR - Summer Walker |

Loveeeeeee Song - Rihanna, Future |

Hit Different - SZA, The Neptunes, Ty Dolla $ign, Pharrell Williams |

Yeah basically that aot fanfic changed lives and it def changed mine sooouhh this bot is heavily based off of it, and I'm act kinda proud of this one ngl. And guess what? This time I act tested the bot multiple times with both proxy and llm so YAYUH! I really recommend using proxy for this one.

Anyways I really hope you like this bot and forgive me for the slightly long intro message but oh well the more the better I THINK? But as always feel free to comment any fixes/changes I should make <3

As always, if you'd like to request a bot, click this here! ╰(*°▽°*)╯
